name: CL Workshop Group Ltd
business: CL Workshop Group Ltd is an investment holding company. Its principal activities are trading of wood products and logs through subsidiaries in Peru, France, Macau, and Hong Kong.

exposures.sentence: The principal activities of the Company are conducted through its subsidiaries which are in the business of trading of wood products and logs.
Our networks and those of our third-party service providers may be vulnerable to cybersecurity risks.
